name: Diana Silva
role: Software Engineer at West Northamptonshire Council
bio: Diana is a software engineer at West Northamptonshire Council, where she builds cloud-based applications and serverless systems that support public services. After transitioning from healthcare into tech at 25, she now combines her full-time engineering role with studying Computing and IT at university. As a GirlCode ambassador, Diana is passionate about encouraging more women to pursue careers in technology and showing that there is no single path into software engineering.
